title: Epigram On One Who Made Long Epitaphs.[129]
content:
Friend, for your epitaphs I'm grieved,
    Where still so much is said;
    One half will never be believed,
    The other never read.
meaning:
"Epigram On One Who Made Long Epitaphs.[129]" is a quintessential example of Alexander Pope's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
